title: About the teacher
quote: Movement is a way of knowing yourself through the silence of your body.

text.first: Maria Ivanova is a certified somatic education practitioner and a specialist in functional biomechanics. For the past 12 years, she has dedicated herself to studying how movement can heal.
text.second: Her approach is valued for its gentleness and precision. Maria works both with adults who want to release tension and with children, helping them build a healthy foundation for movement.
